description_long: This object consists of three upright gravestones made of weathered stone, each with a rectangular base and a slightly arched top. The gravestones are mottled with patches of moss or lichen, giving them an aged and neglected appearance. One of the gravestones is broken, with a large diagonal crack and a separate stone fragment lying nearby, suggesting damage or decay over time. The front faces of the gravestones display faint engravings, including the letters 'R.I.P.' and a simple geometric symbol near the base. The backs of the gravestones are plain, with no visible inscriptions or ornamentation. The overall arrangement and style evoke a small, old graveyard plot, suitable for placement in a park, urban green space, or historical site.
description: A set of three weathered stone gravestones, one of which is broken, with faint engravings and mossy textures. The stones are arranged in a row, evoking an old, neglected graveyard.
description_view_0: Three gravestones are visible from the front, showing 'R.I.P.' engravings and a geometric symbol, with one stone broken and its fragment lying to the right.
description_view_1: A narrow side view reveals the thin profile of the gravestones and the protruding base, with the broken fragment barely visible.
description_view_2: The backs of the three gravestones are shown, plain and unadorned, with the broken fragment separated to the left.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness of the stones and the alignment of the bases.
